hooks.command: echo 'CHECKPOINT: Before this Monitor call — write/update run_log.md SIMULATION STATE table now (status=monitoring, run_id, submit_time).'
echo 'ROADMAP: If any items in guides/ROADMAP.md were completed this turn, update their checkboxes from [ ] to [x] before stopping.'

pending=$(find /home/arz2/PolyJarvis -path '*/.claude/agent-memory/*.md' ! -name 'MEMORY.md' 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -rL 'ingested_at:' 2>/dev/null | head -5); [ -n "$pending" ] && printf 'INGEST: Pending agent memories found — run /ingest-memory before stopping:\n%s\n' "$(echo "$pending" | sed 's|.*/||')" || true

echo 'LOG: classify_polymer done — the result includes preferred_ff, preferred_builder, ff_confidence, ff_justification, and ff_justification_doi fields. Write these directly to D-01 in run_log.md without asking the user — no manual FF choice needed for known classes. For ff_confidence=low or unknown class, escalate to E2 literature search. Also fill D-02 (charges) and D-03 (electrostatics) from the classify_polymer result.'
echo 'LOG: cell generation submitted — confirm D-04 (DP, chains, atom count) is filled in run_log.md.'
echo 'PHAL CHECK: If this run is class PHAL (PVDF/PTFE/PCTFE/PVF), run mcp-servers/mcp-mol-builder-server/patch_fluorine_params.py on the output .data file before submitting to LAMMPS.'
echo 'LOG: LAMMPS chain launched — if this run fails, write a RECOVERY block in run_log.md before retrying.'
echo 'RECOVERY: If the watch_run result shows a failed or error status, invoke /recover before attempting any manual fix. Do not retry ad-hoc — use the skill.'
echo 'LOG: check_equilibration_comprehensive done — read recovery_hint in result for PASS/EXTEND/ESCALATE action. Copy result["d05_markdown"] to run_log.md as D-05.'

echo 'LOG: extract_thermal done — fill D-06 (R², N_bins, F-stat, is_glassy + Tg K) and the α_g, α_r, ΔCp rows in RESULTS B of run_log.md. The Tg (MD @400 K/ns) row also goes in RESULTS B. D-06b (DSC-equiv Tg) is filled after extract_tg_multirate, not here.'
echo 'LOG: extract_equilibrated_density done — fill the ρ row in RESULTS in run_log.md now.'
echo 'LOG: extract_bulk_modulus done — fill the K row in RESULTS in run_log.md now.'
echo 'LOG: EMC cell submitted — record emc_seed in the Seeds: line of run_log.md header immediately. Never use seed=-1; seed must be the specific integer from your RESULT block.'
echo 'LOG: bulk modulus extracted — fill K row (with method label: born/deform/murnaghan) in RESULTS C of run_log.md now.'
echo 'LOG: multirate Tg fit done — fill D-06b (DSC-equiv Tg, log-linear slope, R², N_rates, N_repl) and update Tg (DSC-equiv) row in RESULTS B of run_log.md.'
echo 'PHASE C: generate_run_summary done — now write RESULTS A, B, and C to run_log.md from run_summary.json (density, Tg/CTE/ΔCp, bulk modulus). Do not stop without filling these rows.'
echo 'LOG: LAMMPS script submitted (born/deform/tg-sweep) — if this run fails, write a RECOVERY block in run_log.md before retrying.'

echo 'MONITOR RESULT — interpret by what was printed (not by exit): PROGRESS [##...] → relay to user, no action. RUN_COMPLETE → read sentinel JSON: status=completed→proceed; status=failed→/recover. PROCESS_DEAD_NO_SENTINEL → /recover (OOM/reboot). Neither line → TIMEOUT: run still going — call watch_run(run_id), re-issue Monitor. DO NOT treat timeout as done or failed. | If this was the EQUIL Monitor (equil chain): entering Phase B — Read(guides/THERMAL_TRACK.md) if tg requested; Read(guides/MECHANICAL_TRACK.md) if bulk_modulus requested.'
